creator: freebsd@nagilum.org
text:
The build fails; probably due to a mixup of the base openssl and openssl from ports.
export BASEOBJS="dig.o dighost.o ";  if [ X"" = X -o X"${MAKE_SYMTABLE:-}" = X ] ; then    gcc48 -pthread  -I/var/tmp/export/ports/dns/bind-tools/work/bind-9.9.4 -I./include -I/var/tmp/export/ports/dns/bind-tools/work/bind-9.9.4/lib/dns/include  -I../../lib/dns/include -I/var/tmp/export/ports/dns/bind-tools/work/bind-9.9.4/lib/bind9/include  -I../../lib/bind9/include  -I/var/tmp/export/ports/dns/bind-tools/work/bind-9.9.4/lib/isc/include  -I../../lib/isc  -I../../lib/isc/include  -I../../lib/isc/unix/include  -I../../lib/isc/pthreads/include  -I../../lib/isc/x86_32/include -I/var/tmp/export/ports/dns/bind-tools/work/bind-9.9.4/lib/lwres/include  -I../../lib/lwres/unix/include  -I../../lib/lwres/include -I/var/tmp/export/ports/dns/bind-tools/work/bind-9.9.4/lib/isccfg/include  -I../../lib/isccfg/include -I/usr/local/include  -D_REENTRANT -D_LARGEFILE_SOURCE -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -DVERSION=\"9.9.4\" -DDIG_SIGCHASE=1 -D_THREAD_SAFE -Os -O3 -pipe -march=native -mtune=native -fno-strict-
